methods.name: isEmpty
methods.description: Checks if the content of the editor is empty. - Display criteria for "placeholder".

methods.name: resetOptions
methods.description: Add or reset option property (Editor is reloaded)

methods.name: changeFrameContext
methods.description: Change the current root index.

methods.name: destroy
methods.description: Destroy the suneditor /

methods.name: applyTagEffect
methods.description: Activates the corresponding button with the tags information of the current cursor position, - such as 'bold', 'underline', etc., and executes the 'active' method of the plugins.

methods.name: actionExecutor
methods.description: Execute actions sequentially

methods.name: enterScrollTo
methods.description: Scrolls the editor view to the caret position after pressing Enter. (Ignored on mobile devices)

methods.name: enterPrevent
methods.description: Prevents the default behavior of the Enter key and refocuses the editor.

methods.name: applyToRoots
methods.params: f: (frameContext: SunEditor.FrameContext, rootKey: string | null, frameRoots: Map<string | null, SunEditor.FrameContext>) => void
methods.description: Execute a function by traversing all root targets.

methods.name: addEvent
methods.params: target: any, type: string, listener: EventListenerOrEventListenerObject, useCapture?: boolean | AddEventListenerOptions
methods.description: Register for an event. - Only events registered with this method are unregistered or re-registered when methods such as 'setOptions', 'destroy' are called.

methods.name: removeEvent
methods.description: Remove event

methods.name: addGlobalEvent
methods.params: type: string, listener: (...args: any) => any, useCapture?: boolean | AddEventListenerOptions
methods.description: Add an event to document. - When created as an Iframe, the same event is added to the document in the Iframe.

methods.name: removeGlobalEvent
methods.params: type: string | SunEditor.Event.GlobalInfo, listener?: (...args: any) => any, useCapture?: boolean | AddEventListenerOptions
methods.description: Remove events from document. - When created as an Iframe, the event of the document inside the Iframe is also removed.

methods.name: reset
methods.description: Add or reset option property (Editor is reloaded)

methods.name: resetFrame
methods.description: Add or reset frame option property (Editor is reloaded)

methods.name: get
methods.description: Get state value (supports underscore notation)

methods.name: set
methods.description: Set state value and notify subscribers

methods.name: subscribe
methods.params: path: K, callback: (newValue: StoreState[K], oldValue: StoreState[K]) => void
methods.description: Subscribe to state changes

methods.name: check
methods.description: Returns false if char count is greater than "frameOptions.get('charCounter_max')" when "html" is added to the current editor.

methods.name: getLength
methods.description: Get the [content]'s number of characters or binary data size. (frameOptions.get('charCounter_type')) - If [content] is undefined, get the current editor's number of characters or binary data size.

methods.name: display
methods.description: Set the char count to charCounter element textContent.

methods.name: test
methods.description: Returns false if char count is greater than "frameOptions.get('charCounter_max')" when "inputText" is added to the current editor. - If the current number of characters is greater than "charCounter_max", the excess characters are removed. And call the char.display()

methods.name: setLine
methods.description: Replace the line tag of the current selection.

methods.name: getLine
methods.params: node: Node, validation?: ((current: Node) => boolean) | null
methods.description: If a parent node that contains an argument node finds a format node (format.isLine), it returns that node.

methods.name: setBrLine
methods.description: Replace the br-line tag of the current selection.

methods.name: getBrLine
methods.params: element: Node, validation?: ((current: Node) => boolean) | null
methods.description: If a parent node that contains an argument node finds a "brLine" (format.isBrLine), it returns that node.

methods.name: addLine
methods.description: Append "line" element to sibling node of argument element. - If the "lineNode" argument value is present, the tag of that argument value is inserted, - If not, the currently selected format tag is inserted.

methods.name: getBlock
methods.params: element: Node, validation?: ((current: Node) => boolean) | null
methods.description: If a parent node that contains an argument node finds a format node (format.isBlock), it returns that node.

methods.name: applyBlock
methods.description: Appended all selected "line" element to the argument element("block") and insert

methods.name: removeBlock
methods.description: The elements of the "selectedFormats" array are detached from the "blockElement" element. ("LI" tags are converted to "P" tags) - When "selectedFormats" is null, all elements are detached and return {cc: parentNode, sc: nextSibling, ec: previousSibling, removeArray: [Array of removed elements]}.

methods.name: indent
methods.description: Indent more the selected lines. - margin size : store.get('indentSize') /

methods.name: outdent
methods.description: Indent less the selected lines. - margin size - store.get('indentSize') /

methods.name: isEdgeLine
methods.description: Check if the container and offset values are the edges of the "line"

methods.name: isTextStyleNode
methods.description: It is judged whether it is a node related to the text style.

methods.name: isLine
methods.description: It is judged whether it is the "line" element. - (P, DIV, H[1-6], PRE, LI | class="__se__format__line_xxx") - "line" element also contain "brLine" element

methods.name: isNormalLine
methods.description: It is judged whether it is the only "line" element.

methods.name: isBrLine
methods.description: It is judged whether it is the "brLine" element. - (PRE | class="__se__format__br_line_xxx") - "brLine" elements is included in the "line" element. - "brLine" elements's line break is "BR" tag. ※ Entering the Enter key in the space on the last line ends "brLine" and appends "line".

methods.name: isBlock
methods.description: It is judged whether it is the "block" element. - (BLOCKQUOTE, OL, UL, FIGCAPTION, TABLE, THEAD, TBODY, TR, TH, TD | class="__se__format__block_xxx") - "block" is wrap the "line" and "component"

methods.name: isClosureBlock
methods.description: It is judged whether it is the "closureBlock" element. - (TH, TD | class="__se__format__block_closure_xxx") - "closureBlock" elements is included in the "block". - "closureBlock" element is wrap the "line" and "component" - ※ You cannot exit this format with the Enter key or Backspace key. - ※ Use it only in special cases. ([ex] format of table cells)

methods.name: isClosureBrLine
methods.description: It is judged whether it is the "closureBrLine" element. - (class="__se__format__br_line__closure_xxx") - "closureBrLine" elements is included in the "brLine". - "closureBrLine" elements's line break is "BR" tag. - ※ You cannot exit this format with the Enter key or Backspace key. - ※ Use it only in special cases. ([ex] format of table cells)

methods.name: getLines
methods.description: Returns a "line" array from selected range.

methods.name: getLinesAndComponents
methods.description: Get lines and components from the selected range. (P, DIV, H[1-6], OL, UL, TABLE..) - If some of the component are included in the selection, get the entire that component.

methods.name: filter
methods.description: Filters an HTML string based on allowed and disallowed tags, with optional custom validation. - Removes blacklisted tags and keeps only whitelisted tags. - Allows custom validation functions to replace, modify, or remove elements.

methods.name: clean
methods.description: Cleans and compresses HTML code to suit the editor format.

methods.name: insert
methods.description: Inserts an (HTML element / HTML string / plain string) at the selection range. - If "frameOptions.get('charCounter_max')" is exceeded when "html" is added, null is returned without addition.

methods.name: insertNode
methods.description: Delete selected node and insert argument value node and return. - If the "afterNode" exists, it is inserted after the "afterNode" - Inserting a text node merges with both text nodes on both sides and returns a new "{ container, startOffset, endOffset }".

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Delete the selected range.

methods.name: get
methods.params: { withFrame, includeFullPage, rootKey }?: { withFrame?: boolean; includeFullPage?: boolean; rootKey?: number | Array<number> }
methods.description: Gets the current content

methods.name: set
methods.description: Sets the HTML string to the editor content

methods.name: add
methods.description: Add content to the end of content.

methods.name: getJson
methods.params: { withFrame, rootKey }?: { withFrame?: boolean; rootKey?: number | Array<number> }
methods.description: Gets the current content to JSON data

methods.name: setJson
methods.description: Sets the JSON data to the editor content

methods.name: copy
methods.description: Call "clipboard.write" to copy the contents and display a success/failure toast message.

methods.name: setFullPage
methods.description: Sets the content of the iframe's head tag and body tag when using the "iframe" or "iframe_fullPage" option.

methods.name: compress
methods.description: HTML code compression

methods.name: apply
methods.description: Adds, updates, or deletes style nodes from selected text (a, span, strong, etc.). - 1. If styleNode is provided, a node with the same tags and attributes is added to the selected text. - 2. If the same tag already exists, only its attributes are updated. - 3. If styleNode is null, existing nodes are updated or removed without adding new ones. - 4. Styles matching those in stylesToModify are removed. (Use CSS attribute names, e.g., "background-color") - 5. Classes matching those in stylesToModify (prefixed with ".") are removed. - 6. stylesToModify is used to avoid duplicate property values from styleNode. - 7. Nodes with all styles and classes removed are deleted if they match styleNode, are in nodesToRemove, or if styleNode is null. - 8. Tags matching names in nodesToRemove are deleted regardless of their style and class. - 9. If strictRemove is true, nodes in nodesToRemove are only removed if all their styles and classes are removed. - 10. The function won't modify nodes if the parent has the same class and style values. - However, if nodesToRemove has values, it will work and separate text nodes even if there's no node to replace.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Remove all inline formats (styles and tags) from the currently selected text. - This is a convenience method that calls apply() with null parameters to strip all formatting. - Removes all inline style nodes (span, strong, em, a, etc.) - Preserves only the plain text content - Works on the current selection or collapsed cursor position /

methods.name: apply
methods.params: type: string, selectedCells: Array<Node>, nested: boolean
methods.description: Append all selected "line" element to the list and insert.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: "selectedCells" array are detached from the list element. - The return value is applied when the first and last lines of "selectedFormats" are "LI" respectively.

methods.name: applyNested
methods.description: Nest list cells or cancel nested cells.

methods.name: removeNested
methods.description: Detach Nested all nested lists under the "baseNode". - Returns a list with nested removed.

methods.name: split
methods.params: baseNode: Node, offset: (number | Node) | null, depth?: number
methods.description: Split all tags based on "baseNode"

methods.name: mergeSameTags
methods.params: element: Node, nodePathArray?: number[][] | null, onlyText?: boolean | null
methods.description: Use with "npdePath (dom-query-GetNodePath)" to merge the same attributes and tags if they are present and modify the nodepath. - If "offset" has been changed, it will return as much "offset" as it has been modified. - An array containing change offsets is returned in the order of the "nodePathArray" array.

methods.name: mergeNestedTags
methods.params: element: Node, validation?: (((current: Node) => boolean) | string) | null
methods.description: Remove nested tags without other child nodes.

methods.name: removeAllParents
methods.params: item: Node, validation?: ((current: Node) => boolean) | null, stopParent?: Node | null
methods.description: Delete itself and all parent nodes that match the condition. - Returns an {sc: previousSibling, ec: nextSibling}(the deleted node reference) or null.

methods.name: removeEmptyNode
methods.params: element: Node, notRemoveNode: Node | null, forceDelete: boolean
methods.description: Delete a empty child node of argument element

methods.name: createNestedNode
methods.params: nodeArray: SunEditor.NodeCollection, validate?: ((current: Node) => boolean) | null
methods.description: Creates a nested node structure from the given array of nodes.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Gets the position just outside the argument's internal editor (wysiwygFrame).

methods.name: getLocal
methods.description: Gets the position inside the internal editor of the argument.

methods.name: getGlobal
methods.description: Returns the position of the argument relative to the global document. This is a refactored version using getBoundingClientRect for better performance and accuracy.

methods.name: getGlobalScroll
methods.description: Gets the current editor-relative scroll offset.

methods.name: getWWScroll
methods.description: Get the scroll info of the WYSIWYG area.

methods.name: setRelPosition
methods.params: element: HTMLElement, e_container: HTMLElement, target: HTMLElement, t_container: HTMLElement
methods.description: Sets the relative position of an element

methods.name: setAbsPosition
methods.description: Sets the absolute position of an element

methods.name: setRangePosition
methods.description: Sets the position of an element relative to a range

methods.name: get
methods.description: Get window selection obejct

methods.name: isRange
methods.description: Check if the range object is valid

methods.name: getRange
methods.description: Get current editor's range object

methods.name: setRange
methods.params: startCon: Node | Range, startOff?: number, endCon?: Node, endOff?: number
methods.description: Set current editor's range object and return.

methods.name: removeRange
methods.description: Remove range object and button effect /

methods.name: getNearRange
methods.description: Returns the range (container and offset) near the given target node. - If the target node has a next sibling, it returns the next sibling with an offset of 0. - If there is no next sibling but a previous sibling exists, it returns the previous sibling with an offset of 1.

methods.name: getRangeAndAddLine
methods.description: If the "range" object is a non-editable area, add a line at the top of the editor and update the "range" object.

methods.name: getNode
methods.description: Get current select node

methods.name: getRects
methods.description: Get the Rects object.

methods.name: getDragEventLocationRange
methods.description: Get the custom range object of the event.

methods.name: scrollTo
methods.description: Scroll to the corresponding selection or range position.

methods.name: resetRangeToTextNode
methods.description: Normalizes and resets the selection range to properly target text nodes instead of element nodes for accurate text editing.

methods.name: init
methods.description: Saving the range object and the currently selected node of editor /

methods.name: initDropdownTarget
methods.description: Method for managing dropdown element. - You must add the "dropdown" element using the this method at custom plugin.

methods.name: dropdownOn
methods.description: Opens the dropdown menu for the specified button.

methods.name: dropdownOff
methods.description: Closes the currently open dropdown menu. /

methods.name: dropdownShow
methods.description: Shows a previously hidden dropdown menu that is still in "on" state. - Only works when a dropdown is active (currentButton exists) - Re-displays the dropdown that was hidden by dropdownHide() - Recalculates menu position by calling dropdownOn() again /

methods.name: dropdownHide
methods.description: Temporarily hides the currently active dropdown menu without closing it. - Unlike dropdownOff(), this does not clear the dropdown state or event listeners - The dropdown remains "on" but visually hidden - Use dropdownShow() to make it visible again /

methods.name: containerOn
methods.description: Opens the menu container for the specified button.

methods.name: containerOff
methods.description: Closes the currently open menu container. /

methods.name: disable
methods.description: Disables all toolbar buttons. /

methods.name: enable
methods.description: Enables all toolbar buttons. /

methods.name: show
methods.description: Shows the toolbar. /

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Hides the toolbar. /

methods.name: resetResponsiveToolbar
methods.description: Reset buttons of the responsive toolbar. /

methods.name: setButtons
methods.description: Reset the buttons on the toolbar. (Editor is not reloaded) - You cannot set a new plugin for the button.

methods.name: codeView
methods.description: Changes to code view or wysiwyg view

methods.name: fullScreen
methods.description: Changes to full screen or default screen

methods.name: showBlocks
methods.description: Add or remove the class name of "body" so that the code block is visible

methods.name: print
methods.description: Prints the current content of the editor.

methods.name: preview
methods.description: Open the preview window. /

methods.name: run
methods.params: command: string, type: string, button?: Node | null
methods.description: Run plugin calls and basic commands.

methods.name: runFromTarget
methods.description: Execute "editor.run" with command button.

methods.name: applyTargets
methods.description: It is executed by inserting the button of commandTargets as the argument value of the "f" function. - "func" is called as long as the button array's length.

methods.name: registerTargets
methods.description: Sets command target elements.

methods.name: insert
methods.description: Inserts an element and returns it. (Used for elements: table, hr, image, video) - If "element" is "HR", inserts and returns the new line.

methods.name: applyInsertBehavior
methods.params: container: Node, oNode?: Node | null, insertBehavior?: SunEditor.ComponentInsertType
methods.description: Handles post-insertion behavior for a newly created component based on the specified mode.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Gets the file component and that plugin name - return: {target, component, pluginName} | null

methods.name: select
methods.description: The component(media, file component, table, etc) is selected and the resizing module is called.

methods.name: deselect
methods.description: Deselects the selected component. /

methods.name: is
methods.description: Determines if the specified node is a block component (e.g., img, iframe, video, audio, table) with the class "se-component" - or a direct FIGURE node. This function checks if the node itself is a component - or if it belongs to any components identified by the component manager.

methods.name: isInline
methods.description: Checks if the given node is an inline component (class "se-inline-component"). - If the node is a FIGURE, it checks the parent element instead. - It also verifies whether the node is part of an inline component recognized by the component manager.

methods.name: isBasic
methods.description: Checks if the specified node qualifies as a basic component within the editor. - This function verifies whether the node is recognized as a component by the `is` function, while also ensuring that it is not an inline component as determined by the `isInline` function. - This is used to identify block-level elements or standalone components that are not part of the inline component classification.

methods.name: copy
methods.description: Copies the specified component node to the clipboard. - This function is different from the one called when the user presses the "Ctrl + C" key combination.

methods.name: hoverSelect
methods.description: Temporarily selects a component without showing its controller. This is a lightweight selection mode used for: - Mouse hover: Shows visual selection while hovering, auto-deselects on mouse out - Table column/row resize: Maintains selection after resize without showing controller Key differences from `select()`: - Does NOT show the component's controller (resize handles, toolbar, etc.) - Sets `__overInfo` flag so selection is automatically cleared on mouse out - Calling `select()` afterward will upgrade to full selection with controller

methods.name: focus
methods.description: Focus to wysiwyg area

methods.name: focusEdge
methods.description: If "focusEl" is a component, then that component is selected; if it is a format element, the last text is selected - If "focusEdge" is null, then selected last element

methods.name: nativeFocus
methods.description: Focus to wysiwyg area using "native focus function" /

methods.name: blur
methods.description: Focusout to wysiwyg area (.blur()) /

methods.name: push
methods.description: Saving the current status to the history object stack - If "delay" is true, it will be saved after (options.get('historyStackDelayTime') || 400) milliseconds. - If the function is called again with the "delay" argument true before it is saved, the delay time is renewed. - You can specify the delay time by sending a number.

methods.name: check
methods.description: Immediately saves the current state to the history stack if a delayed save is pending.

methods.name: undo
methods.description: Undo function that restores the previous state from the history stack. /

methods.name: redo
methods.description: Redo function that re-applies a previously undone state from the history stack. /

methods.name: overwrite
methods.description: Overwrites the current state in the history stack with the latest content.

methods.name: pause
methods.description: Pauses the history stack, preventing new entries from being added for up to 5 seconds. /

methods.name: resume
methods.description: Resumes history tracking by allowing new entries to be added to the stack. /

methods.name: reset
methods.description: Resets the history stack and disables related UI buttons. /

methods.name: resetButtons
methods.description: Updates the state of history-related buttons (undo, redo, save) based on the current history stack.

methods.name: getRootStack
methods.description: Returns the root stack containing the history of each frame.

methods.name: resetDelayTime
methods.description: Resets the delay time for saving history.

methods.name: _destroy
methods.description: Clears the entire history stack and cancels any pending save operations. /

methods.name: findComponentInfo
methods.description: Finds component information for the given element.

methods.name: applyRetainFormat
methods.description: Apply retain format rules from plugins to the parsed DOM

methods.name: emitEvent
methods.description: Dispatches an event to all registered plugin handlers synchronously.

methods.name: emitEventAsync
methods.description: Dispatches an event to all registered plugin handlers asynchronously.

methods.name: checkFileInfo
methods.description: Check the components such as image and video and modify them according to the format.

methods.name: resetFileInfo
methods.description: Initialize the information of the components. /

methods.name: register
methods.description: If the plugin is not added, add the plugin and call the 'add' function. - If the plugin is added call callBack function.

methods.name: init
methods.description: Initialize the plugin manager and register plugins.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Get a specific plugin instance

methods.name: command
methods.params: event: KeyboardEvent, ctrl: boolean, shift: boolean, keyCode: string, text: string, edge: boolean, line: HTMLElement, range: Range
methods.description: If there is a shortcut function, run it.

methods.name: disable
methods.description: Disable the shortcut activation. /

methods.name: enable
methods.description: Enable the shortcut activation. /

methods.name: setEditorStyle
methods.description: set editor frame styles. - Define the style of the edit area - It can also be defined with the "setOptions" method, but the "setEditorStyle" method does not render the editor again.

methods.name: setTheme
methods.description: Set the theme to the editor

methods.name: setDir
methods.description: Set direction to "rtl" or "ltr".

methods.name: readOnly
methods.description: Switch to or off "ReadOnly" mode.

methods.name: disable
methods.description: Disables the editor.

methods.name: enable
methods.description: Enables the editor.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Shows the editor interface.

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Hides the editor interface.

methods.name: showLoading

methods.name: hideLoading
methods.description: Hides the loading spinner.

methods.name: alertClose

methods.name: showToast
methods.description: Show toast

methods.name: closeToast

methods.name: setControllerOnDisabledButtons
methods.description: This method disables or enables the toolbar buttons when the controller is activated or deactivated. - When the controller is activated, the toolbar buttons are disabled; when the controller is deactivated, the buttons are enabled.

methods.name: onControllerContext

methods.name: offControllerContext
methods.description: Reset the controller target context. /

methods.name: enableBackWrapper

methods.name: disableBackWrapper

methods.name: offCurrentController
methods.description: Closes the currently active controller by delegating to the component's deselect logic. Use this method to close a single active controller from external code.

methods.name: offCurrentModal

methods.name: setFigureContainer

methods.name: isButtonDisabled
methods.description: Check if the button can be executed in the current state (ReadOnly, etc.)

methods.name: reHeader

methods.name: rePage

methods.name: resizePage

methods.name: scrollPage
methods.description: Scrolls the document page. /

methods.name: scrollWindow
methods.description: Scrolls the window to a specific position. /

methods.name: getCurrentPageNumber

methods.name: pageUp
methods.description: Moves to the previous page. /

methods.name: pageDown
methods.description: Moves to the next page. /

methods.name: pageGo
methods.description: Moves to a specific page.

methods.name: on
methods.description: Highlights the header of the current line.

methods.name: onChangeText
methods.description: Handles text changes in the document. /

methods.name: setCellInfo
methods.description: Sets various table-related information based on the provided table cell element (`<td>`). This includes updating cell, row, and table attributes, handling spanning cells, and adjusting the UI for elements like headers and captions.

methods.name: setRowInfo
methods.description: Sets row-related information based on the provided table row element (`<tr>`). This includes updating the row count and the index of the selected row.

methods.name: setTableInfo
methods.description: Sets the table and figure elements based on the provided cell element, and stores references to them for later use.

methods.name: resetInfo
methods.description: Resets the internal state related to table cell selection, - clearing any selected cells and removing associated styles and event listeners. /

methods.name: historyPush
methods.description: Adds a new entry to the history stack. /

methods.name: active
methods.params: element: HTMLElement | null, target: HTMLElement | null

methods.name: display
methods.description: Updates the displayed page number and total pages in the navigator. /

methods.name: submitFile
methods.description: Create an "audio" component using the provided files.

methods.name: submitURL
methods.description: Create an "audio" component using the provided url.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates or updates an audio component within the editor. - If `isUpdate` is `true`, updates the existing element's `src`. - Otherwise, inserts a new audio component with the given file.

methods.name: #checkContentType
methods.description: Checks if the given URL matches any of the defined URL patterns.

methods.name: findProcessUrl
methods.description: Finds and processes the URL for embedding by matching it against known service patterns.

methods.name: submitSRC
methods.description: Processes the provided source (URL or embed code) and submits it for embedding. - It parses the input, triggers any necessary events, and creates or updates the embed component.

methods.name: submitFile
methods.description: Create an "image" component using the provided files.

methods.name: submitURL
methods.description: Create an "image" component using the provided url.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates a new image component, wraps it in a figure container with an optional anchor, - applies size and alignment settings, and inserts it into the editor.

methods.name: createInline
methods.description: Creates a new inline image component, wraps it in an inline figure container with an optional anchor, - applies size settings, and inserts it into the editor.

methods.name: #checkContentType

methods.name: findProcessUrl
methods.description: Finds and processes the URL for video by matching it against known service patterns.

methods.name: convertUrlYoutube
methods.description: Converts a YouTube URL into an embeddable URL. - If the URL does not start with "http", it prepends "https://". It also replaces "watch?v=" with the embed path.

methods.name: convertUrlVimeo
methods.description: Converts a Vimeo URL into an embeddable URL. - Removes any trailing slash and extracts the video ID from the URL.

methods.name: addQuery
methods.description: Adds query parameters to a URL. - If the URL already contains a query string, the provided query is appended with an "&".

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates or updates a video embed component. - When updating, it replaces the existing element if necessary and applies the new source, size, and alignment. - When creating, it wraps the provided element in a figure container.

methods.name: createIframeTag
methods.description: Creates a new iframe element for video embedding. - Applies any additional properties provided and sets the necessary attributes for embedding.

methods.name: createVideoTag
methods.description: Creates a new video element for video embedding. - Applies any additional properties provided and sets the necessary attributes.

methods.name: submitFile

methods.description: Create an "video" component using the provided url.

Write the content to the clipboard - Iframe is replaced with a placeholder :
[iframe: iframe.src]
- "iframe placeholder" is re-rendered in html.clean when pasted into the editor.

methods.name: htmlToJson
methods.description: Parses an HTML string into a DOM tree, then recursively traverses the nodes to convert them into a structured JSON representation. -Each element includes its tag name, attributes, and children. -Text nodes are represented as { type: 'text', content: '...' }.

methods.name: jsonToHtml
methods.description: Takes a JSON structure representing HTML elements and recursively serializes it into a valid HTML string. -It rebuilds each tag with attributes and inner content. Text content and attributes are safely escaped to prevent parsing issues or XSS. Useful for restoring dynamic HTML from a data format.

methods.name: htmlToEntity
methods.description: Convert HTML string to HTML Entity

methods.name: entityToHTML
methods.description: Convert HTML Entity to HTML string

methods.name: debounce
methods.description: Debounce function

methods.name: syncMaps
methods.params: targetMap: Map<any, any>, referenceMap: Map<any, any>
methods.description: Synchronizes two Map objects by updating the first Map with the values from the second, - and deleting any keys in the first Map that are not present in the second.

methods.name: mergeMaps
methods.description: Merges multiple Map objects into a new Map using spread syntax. - Entries from later maps in the arguments list will overwrite entries from earlier maps if keys conflict. - The original maps are not modified.

methods.name: getValues
methods.description: Object.values

methods.name: camelToKebabCase
methods.description: Convert the CamelCase To the KebabCase.

methods.name: spanToStyleNode
methods.description: Converts styles within a <span> tag to corresponding HTML tags (e.g., <strong>, <em>, <u>, <s>). Maintains the original <span> tag and wraps its content with the new tags. /

methods.description: Check the node is an HTMLElement node.

methods.description: It is judged whether it is the input element (INPUT, TEXTAREA)

methods.description: Check the node is a table

methods.description: Check the node is a table elements. (table, thead, tbody, tr, th, td)

methods.description: Checks whether the given node is a content-less (void) HTML tag

methods.description: Checks if the given node is a container component (class "se-component-container").

methods.name: isWysiwygFrame
methods.description: It is judged whether it is the edit region top div element or iframe's body tag.

methods.name: isNonEditable
methods.description: It is judged whether it is the contenteditable property is false.

methods.name: isSpanWithoutAttr
methods.description: Check the span's attributes are empty.

methods.name: isSameAttributes
methods.description: Compares the style and class for equal values.

methods.name: isExcludeFormat
methods.description: It is judged whether it is the not checking node. (class="katex", "MathJax", "se-exclude-format")

methods.name: isUneditable
methods.description: Checks for "__se__uneditable" in the class list. - Components with class "__se__uneditable" cannot be modified.

methods.name: isImportantDisabled
methods.description: Checks if element can't be easily enabled

methods.name: getPositionIndex
methods.description: Returns the index compared to other sibling nodes.

methods.name: getNodePath
methods.description:
Returns the position of the "node" in the "parentNode" in a numerical array. - e.g.)

aabb

: getNodePath(node: "bb", parentNode: "

") -> [1, 0]

methods.name: getNodeFromPath
methods.description: Returns the node in the location of the path array obtained from "helper.dom.getNodePath".

methods.name: getChildNode
methods.params: element: Node, validation: ((current: any) => boolean) | null
methods.description: Get all "child node" of the argument value element

methods.name: getListChildren
methods.params: element: Node, validation: ((current: any) => boolean) | null, depth: number | null
methods.description: Get all "children" of the argument value element (Without text nodes)

methods.name: getListChildNodes
methods.params: element: Node, validation: ((current: any) => boolean) | null, depth: number | null
methods.description: Get all "childNodes" of the argument value element (Include text nodes)

methods.name: getNodeDepth
methods.description: Returns the number of parents nodes. - "0" when the parent node is the WYSIWYG area. - '-1' when the element argument is the WYSIWYG area.

methods.name: sortNodeByDepth
methods.description: Sort a node array by depth of element.

methods.name: compareElements
methods.description: Compares two elements to find a common ancestor, and returns the order of the two elements.

methods.name: getParentElement
methods.params: element: Node, query: string | ((current: any) => boolean) | Node, depth?: number | null
methods.description: Get the parent element of the argument value. - A tag that satisfies the query condition is imported.

methods.name: getParentElements
methods.params: element: Node, query: string | ((current: any) => boolean) | Node, depth?: number | null
methods.description: Gets all ancestors of the argument value. - Get all tags that satisfy the query condition.

methods.name: getCommandTarget
methods.description: Gets the element with "data-command" attribute among the parent elements.

methods.name: getEventTarget
methods.description: Get the event.target element.

methods.name: getEdgeChild
methods.params: node: Node, query: string | ((current: any) => boolean) | Node, last: boolean
methods.description: Get the child element of the argument value. - A tag that satisfies the query condition is imported.

methods.name: getEdgeChildNodes
methods.description: Get edge child nodes of the argument value. - 1. The first node of all the child nodes of the "first" element is returned. - 2. The last node of all the child nodes of the "last" element is returned. - 3. When there is no "last" element, the first and last nodes of all the children of the "first" element are returned.

methods.name: getPreviousDeepestNode
methods.description: Gets the previous sibling last child. If there is no sibling, then it'll take it from the closest ancestor with child

methods.name: getNextDeepestNode
methods.description: Gets the next sibling first child. If there is no sibling, then it'll take it from the closest ancestor with child

methods.name: findTextIndexOnLine
methods.params: line: Node, offsetContainer: Node, offset: number, validate?: ((current: any) => boolean) | null
methods.description: Find the index of the text node in the line element.

methods.name: findTabEndIndex
methods.params: line: Node, baseIndex: number, minTabSize: number
methods.description: Find the end index of a sequence of at least minTabSize consecutive non-breaking spaces or spaces - which are interpreted as a tab key, occurring after a given base index in a text string.

methods.name: findVisualLastCell
methods.description: Finds the table cell that appears visually at the bottom-right position, considering both rowSpan and colSpan, even if smaller cells are placed after large merged cells.

methods.name: getScrollParents
methods.description: Finds and returns parent containers that are scrollable.

methods.name: getIframeDocument
methods.description: Get the argument iframe's document object if use the "iframe" or "fullPage" options

methods.name: clone
methods.description: Clones a node while preserving its type.

methods.description: Create Element node

methods.name: createTextNode
methods.description: Create text node

methods.name: getAttributesToString
methods.description: Get attributes of argument element to string ('class="---" name="---" ')

methods.name: arrayFilter
methods.params: array: SunEditor.NodeCollection, validation: ((current: any) => boolean) | null
methods.description: Get the items array from the array that matches the condition.

methods.name: arrayFind
methods.params: array: SunEditor.NodeCollection, validation: ((current: any) => boolean) | null
methods.description: Get the item from the array that matches the condition.

methods.description: Check if an array contains an element

methods.description: Get the index of the argument value in the element array

methods.name: nextIndex

methods.name: prevIndex

methods.description: Add style and className of copyEl to originEl

methods.description: Replace element

methods.description: Set the text content value of the argument value element

methods.params: elements: Node | Node[], styleName: string, value: string | number
methods.description: Set style, if all styles are deleted, the style properties are deleted.

methods.params: buttonList: SunEditor.NodeCollection, disabled: boolean, important?: boolean
methods.description: In the predefined code view mode, the buttons except the executable button are changed to the 'disabled' state.

methods.name: hasClass
methods.description: Determine whether any of the matched elements are assigned the given class

methods.name: addClass
methods.description: Append the className value of the argument value element

methods.description: Flash the class name of the argument value element for a certain time

methods.name: getClientSize
methods.description: Gets the size of the documentElement client size.

methods.name: getViewportSize
methods.description: Gets the size of the window visualViewport size

methods.name: applyInlineStylesAll
methods.params: wwTarget: Node, includeWW: boolean, styles: Iterable<string>
methods.description: Copies the "wwTarget" element and returns it with inline all styles applied.

methods.name: waitForMediaLoad
methods.description: Wait for media elements to load

methods.name: getRootCssVar
methods.description: Gets a CSS variable on the root element of the editor.

methods.name: setRootCssVar
methods.description: Sets a CSS variable on the root element of the editor.

methods.name: createTooltipInner
methods.description: Create tooltip HTML

methods.name: onload
methods.description: Fired when the editor has completed full initialization. This event is deferred via setTimeout to ensure all DOM layout calculations are complete, toolbar is visible, ResizeObserver is registered, and history stack is initialized. Use this event to safely call editor methods immediately after creation.

methods.name: onScroll
methods.description: Fired when the editor content area is scrolled. Use this to sync UI elements with scroll position or implement custom scroll behaviors.

methods.name: onMouseDown
methods.description: Fired when the user presses a mouse button down in the editor. Triggered before internal mousedown processing. Return false to prevent the default editor behavior.

methods.name: onClick
methods.description: Fired when the user clicks in the editor. Triggered before component selection and default line creation. Return false to prevent the default editor behavior.

methods.name: onBeforeInput
methods.description: Fired before text input is inserted into the editor. Triggered after character count validation. Return false to prevent the input from being processed.

methods.name: onInput
methods.description: Fired when text content is input into the editor (typing, composition, paste). Triggered after default line creation and selection initialization. Return false to prevent history push.

methods.name: onMouseLeave
methods.description: Fired when the mouse cursor leaves the editor area. Return false to prevent the default editor behavior.

methods.name: onMouseUp
methods.description: Fired when the user releases a mouse button in the editor. Triggered after internal selection updates. Return false to prevent the default editor behavior.

methods.name: onKeyDown
methods.description: Fired when a key is pressed down in the editor. Triggered before shortcut command execution and keydown reducers. Return false to prevent the default editor behavior including shortcuts, actions, and text input.

methods.name: onKeyUp
methods.description: Fired when a key is released in the editor. Triggered after format tag cleanup and zero-width character removal. Return false to prevent history push for history-relevant keys.

methods.name: onFocus
methods.description: Fired when the editor gains focus (managed focus via editor.focusManager.focus()). Triggered after toolbar display updates and status flags are set. This is different from onNativeFocus which fires on native DOM focus events.

methods.name: onNativeFocus
methods.description: Fired when the editor receives a native DOM focus event. Triggered before managed focus processing. This is the raw browser focus event, use onFocus for managed focus handling.

methods.name: onBlur
methods.description: Fired when the editor loses focus (managed blur via editor.blur()). Triggered after balloon toolbar is hidden and status flags are updated. This is different from onNativeBlur which fires on native DOM blur events.

methods.name: onNativeBlur
methods.description: Fired when the editor receives a native DOM blur event. Triggered before managed blur processing. This is the raw browser blur event, use onBlur for managed blur handling.

methods.name: onCopy
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; frameContext: SunEditor.FrameContext; event: Event; clipboardData: Event }
methods.description: Fired when the user attempts to copy content from the editor. Triggered before copying to clipboard. Return false to prevent the copy operation.

methods.name: onCut
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; frameContext: SunEditor.FrameContext; event: Event; clipboardData: Event }
methods.description: Fired when the user attempts to cut content from the editor. Triggered before cutting to clipboard. Return false to prevent the cut operation and history push.

methods.name: onChange
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; frameContext: SunEditor.FrameContext; data: string }
methods.description: Fired when the editor content has changed. Triggered after history stack updates, undo/redo operations, and user edits. Use this to sync external state or validate content. The data parameter contains the current HTML content.

methods.name: onShowToolbar
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; toolbar: HTMLElement; mode: string; frameContext: SunEditor.FrameContext }
methods.description: Fired when a toolbar becomes visible. Triggered for balloon mode and inline mode toolbars. The mode parameter indicates the toolbar type ('balloon' or 'inline').

methods.name: onShowController
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; frameContext: SunEditor.FrameContext; caller: string; info: SunEditor.Module.Controller.Info }
methods.description: Fired after a component controller (floating toolbar) is displayed. Triggered when components (images, videos, tables) are selected. The caller parameter indicates which plugin triggered the controller.

methods.name: onBeforeShowController
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; frameContext: SunEditor.FrameContext; caller: string; info: SunEditor.Module.Controller.Info }
methods.description: Fired before a component controller (floating toolbar) is displayed. Triggered when components (images, videos, tables) are about to be selected. Return false to prevent the controller from showing.

methods.name: onToggleCodeView
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; frameContext: SunEditor.FrameContext; is: boolean }
methods.description: Fired when the editor switches between WYSIWYG view and code view. The is parameter indicates whether code view is now active (true) or WYSIWYG view is active (false).

methods.name: onToggleFullScreen
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; frameContext: SunEditor.FrameContext; is: boolean }
methods.description: Fired when the editor enters or exits fullscreen mode. The is parameter indicates whether fullscreen mode is now active (true) or normal mode is active (false).

methods.name: onResizeEditor
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; frameContext: SunEditor.FrameContext; height: number; prevHeight: boolean; observerEntry: ResizeObserverEntry }
methods.description: Fired when the editor's wysiwyg area height changes. Triggered by ResizeObserver. Use this to sync external UI elements or implement custom resize behaviors. Parameters include current height, previous height, and the ResizeObserverEntry.

methods.name: onSetToolbarButtons
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; frameContext: SunEditor.FrameContext; buttonTray: HTMLElement }
methods.description: Fired after toolbar buttons are created and rendered. Triggered during toolbar initialization and resetToolbarButtons(). Use this to customize toolbar DOM or add custom elements to the buttonTray.

methods.name: onSave
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; frameContext: SunEditor.FrameContext; data: Event }
methods.description: Fired when the save command is executed (Ctrl+S or save button). Use this to send editor content to a server or perform custom save logic. Return a Promise resolving to false to prevent the save operation from completing.

methods.name: onResetButtons
methods.description: Fired when toolbar button states are reset. Triggered during undo/redo operations and history navigation. Use this to update custom toolbar buttons or external UI state.

methods.name: onFontActionBefore
methods.description: Fired before a font family change is applied to the selection. Triggered by font dropdown selection. Return a Promise resolving to false to cancel the font change operation.

methods.name: onDrop
methods.description: Fired when the user attempts to drop content into the editor. Triggered after HTML cleaning and character count validation. Return false to cancel drop, or return a string to replace the drop data.

methods.name: onPaste
methods.description: Fired when the user attempts to paste content into the editor. Triggered after HTML cleaning and character count validation. Return false to cancel paste, or return a string to replace the paste data.

methods.name: imageUploadHandler
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; xmlHttp: XMLHttpRequest; info: ImageInfo }
methods.description: Custom handler for image upload requests. Fired after the XMLHttpRequest is sent but before default response processing. Return a Promise resolving to true if you handle the upload response yourself, or false to use default processing. The xmlHttp parameter provides access to the XMLHttpRequest object.

methods.name: onImageUploadBefore
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; info: ImageInfo; handler: (newInfo?: ImageInfo | null) => void }
methods.description: Fired before an image is uploaded to the server. Use this to validate, resize, or modify image data before upload. Return false to cancel upload, return an ImageInfo object to modify the upload data, or call the handler parameter to proceed with modified data.

methods.name: onImageLoad
methods.description: Fired after images are successfully loaded into the editor. Triggered after upload completion or URL-based image insertion. The infoList parameter contains an array of FileManagementInfo objects for all loaded images.

methods.name: onImageAction
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; info: FileManagementInfo; element: HTMLElement | null; state: 'create' | 'update' | 'delete'; index: number; remainingFilesCount: number; pluginName: string }
methods.description: Fired when an image is created, updated, or deleted in the editor. The state parameter indicates the action type ('create', 'update', or 'delete'). Use this to sync image state with external systems or track image modifications.

methods.name: onImageUploadError
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; error: string; limitSize?: number; uploadSize?: number; currentSize?: number; file?: File }
methods.description: Fired when an image upload fails due to size limits, server errors, or other issues. Return a Promise resolving to a custom error message string to override the default error message, or undefined to use the default message.

methods.name: onImageDeleteBefore
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; element: HTMLElement; container: HTMLElement; align: string; alt: string; url: string | null }
methods.description: Fired before an image is deleted from the editor. Use this to confirm deletion, notify server, or perform cleanup. Return a Promise resolving to false to prevent the image from being deleted.

methods.name: videoUploadHandler
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; xmlHttp: XMLHttpRequest; info: VideoInfo }
methods.description: Custom handler for video upload requests. Fired after the XMLHttpRequest is sent but before default response processing. Return a Promise resolving to true if you handle the upload response yourself, or false to use default processing. The xmlHttp parameter provides access to the XMLHttpRequest object.

methods.name: onVideoUploadBefore
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; info: VideoInfo; handler: (newInfo?: VideoInfo | null) => void }
methods.description: Fired before a video is uploaded to the server. Use this to validate, transcode, or modify video data before upload. Return false to cancel upload, return a VideoInfo object to modify the upload data, or call the handler parameter to proceed with modified data.

methods.name: onVideoLoad
methods.description: Fired after videos are successfully loaded into the editor. Triggered after upload completion or URL-based video insertion (iframe/video tag). The infoList parameter contains an array of FileManagementInfo objects for all loaded videos.

methods.name: onVideoAction
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; info: FileManagementInfo; element: HTMLElement | null; state: 'create' | 'update' | 'delete'; index: number; remainingFilesCount: number; pluginName: string }
methods.description: Fired when a video is created, updated, or deleted in the editor. The state parameter indicates the action type ('create', 'update', or 'delete'). Use this to sync video state with external systems or track video modifications.

methods.name: onVideoUploadError
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; error: string; limitSize?: number; uploadSize?: number; currentSize?: number; file?: File }
methods.description: Fired when a video upload fails due to size limits, server errors, or other issues. Return a Promise resolving to a custom error message string to override the default error message, or undefined to use the default message.

methods.name: onVideoDeleteBefore
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; element: HTMLElement; container: HTMLElement; align: string; url: string }
methods.description: Fired before a video is deleted from the editor. Use this to confirm deletion, notify server, or perform cleanup. Return a Promise resolving to false to prevent the video from being deleted.

methods.name: audioUploadHandler
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; xmlHttp: XMLHttpRequest; info: AudioInfo }
methods.description: Custom handler for audio upload requests. Fired after the XMLHttpRequest is sent but before default response processing. Return a Promise resolving to true if you handle the upload response yourself, or false to use default processing. The xmlHttp parameter provides access to the XMLHttpRequest object.

methods.name: onAudioUploadBefore
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; info: AudioInfo; handler: (newInfo?: AudioInfo | null) => void }
methods.description: Fired before an audio file is uploaded to the server. Use this to validate, transcode, or modify audio data before upload. Return false to cancel upload, return an AudioInfo object to modify the upload data, or call the handler parameter to proceed with modified data.

methods.name: onAudioUploadError
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; error: string; limitSize?: number; uploadSize?: number; currentSize?: number; file?: File }
methods.description: Fired when an audio upload fails due to size limits, server errors, or other issues. Return a Promise resolving to a custom error message string to override the default error message, or undefined to use the default message.

methods.name: onAudioLoad
methods.description: Fired after audio files are successfully loaded into the editor. Triggered after upload completion or URL-based audio insertion. The infoList parameter contains an array of FileManagementInfo objects for all loaded audio files.

methods.name: onAudioAction
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; info: FileManagementInfo; element: HTMLElement | null; state: 'create' | 'update' | 'delete'; index: number; remainingFilesCount: number; pluginName: string }
methods.description: Fired when an audio element is created, updated, or deleted in the editor. The state parameter indicates the action type ('create', 'update', or 'delete'). Use this to sync audio state with external systems or track audio modifications.

methods.name: onAudioDeleteBefore
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; element: HTMLElement; container: HTMLElement; url: string }
methods.description: Fired before an audio element is deleted from the editor. Use this to confirm deletion, notify server, or perform cleanup. Return a Promise resolving to false to prevent the audio from being deleted.

methods.name: onFileUploadBefore
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; info: FileInfo; handler: (newInfo?: FileInfo | null) => void }
methods.description: Fired before a file is uploaded to the server (via fileUpload plugin). Use this to validate or modify file data before upload. Return false to cancel upload, return a FileInfo object to modify the upload data, or call the handler parameter to proceed with modified data.

methods.name: onFileLoad
methods.description: Fired after files are successfully uploaded and loaded into the editor. Triggered by the fileUpload plugin after upload completion. The infoList parameter contains an array of FileManagementInfo objects for all loaded files.

methods.name: onFileAction
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; info: FileManagementInfo; element: HTMLElement | null; state: 'create' | 'update' | 'delete'; index: number; remainingFilesCount: number; pluginName: string }
methods.description: Fired when a file link is created, updated, or deleted in the editor. The state parameter indicates the action type ('create', 'update', or 'delete'). Use this to sync file state with external systems or track file modifications.

methods.name: onFileUploadError
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; error: string; limitSize?: number; uploadSize?: number; currentSize?: number; file?: File }
methods.description: Fired when a file upload fails due to size limits, server errors, or other issues. Return a Promise resolving to a custom error message string to override the default error message, or undefined to use the default message.

methods.name: onFileDeleteBefore
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; element: HTMLElement; container: HTMLElement; url: string }
methods.description: Fired before a file link is deleted from the editor. Use this to confirm deletion, notify server, or perform cleanup. Return a Promise resolving to false to prevent the file link from being deleted.

methods.name: onExportPDFBefore
methods.description: Fired before the editor content is exported to PDF. Use this to modify content, add metadata, or cancel the export. Return a Promise resolving to false to prevent the PDF export.

methods.name: onFileManagerAction
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; info: FileManagementInfo; element: HTMLElement | null; state: 'create' | 'update' | 'delete'; index: number; remainingFilesCount: number; pluginName: string }
methods.description: Fired when any media element (image, video, audio, file) is created, updated, or deleted. This is a unified event that triggers for all media types. The pluginName parameter indicates which plugin triggered the action ('image', 'video', 'audio', or 'file').

methods.name: onEmbedInputBefore
methods.description: Fired before an embed URL is processed and inserted into the editor. Use this to validate URLs, add custom embed processors, or modify embed parameters. Return false to cancel insertion, return an EmbedInfo object to modify the embed data, or call the handler parameter to proceed with modified data.

methods.name: onEmbedDeleteBefore
methods.params: params: { $: SunEditor.Deps; element: HTMLElement; container: HTMLElement; align: string; url: string }
methods.description: Fired before an embedded element (iframe, custom embed) is deleted from the editor. Use this to confirm deletion or perform cleanup. Return a Promise resolving to false to prevent the embed from being deleted.
